channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Apotheosis Tweak - Fantasy Creature Balance
item.description: Balance tweaks to Fantasy Creatures Reborn

item.title: Battle Towers No Tools No Armors Patch
item.description: Remove all tools, weapons and armors from loot tables in underground and surface towers.

item.title: Battle Towers No Armors Patch
item.description: Remove all armors from loot tables in underground and surface towers

item.title: Battle Towers No Tools Patch
item.description: Remove all tools from battle towers loot table

item.title: Battle Towers
item.description: Add Towers with dangerous creatures to fight and explore in your world

item.title: TinkerTailor - Backpacks
item.description: More backpacks & pouches for the veteran seraph. Made with love & pain, No AI.

item.title: Quartermaster
item.description: Run your whole base from one desk.

item.title: Spawners API
item.description: Add custom spawners

item.title: Elk Adornments
item.description: Masks for you and your elk with Modular Elk Armor!

item.title: Talonborne
item.description: Rideable Flying Hippogryphs — Hatch wild nest eggs and raise your own sky mount.

item.title: Empty Village
item.description: Adds empty villages to world generation

item.title: octatonic
item.description: Mod manager via command line interface

item.title: Boric Alchemy
item.description: Boric Alchemy adds chemical routes to create and refine resources, and create alchemical marvels!

item.title: Compost This
item.description: Compost This to accelerate your rot production

item.title: Open Claims
item.description: GUI for claims and receive more blocks and areas to claim per hour

item.title: Arachnophobia Mode - Locust
item.description: Arachnophobia mode that turns locusts into little bean bugs

item.title: Divine Ascension
item.description: Religion mod: deities, favor, blessings, and multi-religion civilizations.

item.title: Still Useful Stuff
item.description: Continuation of jakecool19's' Useful Stuff.

item.title: TFK Player Lib Patch
item.description: Patches PlayerModelLib color swatches into a wheel layout.

item.title: Exotic Milk
item.description: Have you ever wanted milk from an entity that doesnt normally produce milk? Now's your chance!

item.title: Sacred Classes
item.description: A collection of new and improved classes for multiplayer

item.title: Galeret
item.description: A race of cat people based on kahjit

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: Boat Autopilot
item.description: Long boat trips in Vintage Story are beautiful… the first three times.

item.title: Dar's Commands
item.description: Some fun admin commands.

item.title: Collodion -- Classic Photography
item.description: Save scenes from your world onto wet plates and develop them into photos to decorate your home with!

item.title: Kobold Player Model Redux
item.description: A complete 1.21+ remake of Soi's Kobold player model, for PlayerModelLib by Maltiez!

item.title: Dense Ground Storage
item.description: Place down more items per block and on chiseled blocks

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Introduces new extreme weather events. Blizzards, sandstorms, tornadoes, hurricanes and more!

item.title: Atlas
item.description: Integration testing for mods: xUnit scenarios against a real headless server, in your IDE and CI
